description_long: This is a tall, narrow shelving unit constructed from light-colored wood or wood laminate, featuring five open shelves with rounded front edges. The shelves are evenly spaced and provide ample vertical storage for books, decorative items, or small containers. The side panels are solid and extend slightly above the top shelf, giving the unit a subtle lip at the top. The back appears to be open, allowing for easy access and visibility of stored items. The overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for placement against a wall in urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or residential hallways.
description: A tall, light wood shelving unit with five open, rounded-edge shelves and solid side panels, designed for vertical storage and display.
description_view_0: Side view showing the solid, light wood panel with subtle wood grain and no visible shelves.
description_view_1: Narrow edge view highlighting the thin profile of the unit, with no shelves or interior details visible.
description_view_2: Front view displaying five open shelves with rounded fronts and solid side panels, clearly showing the storage spaces.
description_view_3: Angled view from the back, revealing the open rear and the depth of the shelves.
